description: A designed graphic with a booking-style portrait of a man set inside a white photo frame against a dark interior background. A handwritten-style caption reads 'AGGRAVATED ASSAULT WITH A WEAPON'. Text at the lower left reads 'Worst of the Worst' with a 'Portland' tab, and an ICE seal sits at the bottom.
notable_text: AGGRAVATED ASSAULT WITH A WEAPON; Worst of the Worst; Portland; ICE
